raw_consumer_statement:
Hello, I am the primary cardholder and recently discovered several fraudulent transactions made on an unauthorized additional card, which was activated and used without my consent. I never received the physical card in person. 
Fraud Transactions Summary : Date Description Amount XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX CA {$370.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX CA {$440.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX CA {$440.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX CA {$2800.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX # XXXX XXXX XXXX CA {$71.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX CA {$220.00} All of these transactions occurred between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX and were made without my authorization. The total amount of the fraudulent charges is {$4400.00}. 
Actions Taken : I reported all of these transactions to American Express ( AMEX ) as soon as I became aware of them. The case number is XXXX and the reference number is XXXX. 

Despite my repeated efforts over the past XXXX months, AMEX has rejected my dispute for all the fraudulent transactions and has not provided any further details, such as who activated the additional card, when it was activated, or how it was activated without my authorization ( e.g., signature, phone call, or verification code ). 

I have also filed a police report. The police report number is XXXX. 

I am extremely frustrated and concerned by the lack of resolution and transparency from AMEX regarding this serious case of fraud. These unauthorized transactions have caused me significant distress, and I am seeking urgent assistance in resolving this matter. I respectfully request a thorough investigation and a clear explanation of how this additional card could have been activated and used without my knowledge or consent.
